intent: process the first sample with scanpy

blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy following the standard QC, normalization, and clustering workflow.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present the plan for processing the first sample:

input.title: Scanpy QC & Clustering - Patient 145 Day 0
input.summary: Standard scRNA-seq QC, normalization, dimensionality reduction, and clustering on GSM5746259 (7,532 cells)
input.rationale: Understand cell composition, quality, and phenotypes in the first COVID-19 patient timepoint.
input.assumptions:
- First sample = GSM5746259 (Patient 145, Day 0)
  - Standard QC thresholds: n_genes ≥ 200, mitochondrial fraction < 20%
  - Use Leiden clustering (leiden resolution 1.0)
  - Compute marker genes per cluster

steps.title: Load the first sample from the registered dataset
steps.description: Extract GSM5746259 from the combined h5ad, reload as single-sample AnnData

steps.title: QC metrics and cell filtering
steps.description: Calculate n_genes, n_counts, pct_mito; filter cells with n_genes ≥ 200 and pct_mito < 0.20; show before/after

steps.title: Normalization and HVG selection
steps.description: normalize_total(target_sum=1e4) + log1p; select ~2000 HVGs with mean, disp, mean_counts filters

steps.title: Dimensionality reduction: PCA and UMAP
steps.description: PCA on HVGs (n_comps=50); compute neighbors (n_neighbors=15); UMAP

steps.title: Cluster marker genes
steps.description: rank_genes_groups (Wilcoxon); show top 10 genes per cluster
